issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent declares attack), not 'OnAttacked' (this card is attacked). The effect activates when opponent attacks, before target is declared.

Condition references HasRestingDon with count:1, but the card text says 'DON!! −1' as a cost. This should be a cost action (AttachDon or similar resource spend), not a condition check. The condition should verify the player CAN pay this cost, or the cost should be modeled as a separate action.
Missing the core effect: returning DON!! cards from field to DON!! deck. Current actions only apply Blocker and PowerBoost. The DSL should include an action to handle the DON!! return mechanic.
